item.description:
Release v4.3.0

Changes since v4.2.3

  • docs(device-info): add function enhancement proposals based on web research
  • feat: enhance LSP diagnostic filtering, suppress false positives for known modules
  • feat(app): centralize plugin storage paths in AppConfig
  • feat(app): support opening projects from external apps and URL scheme
  • feat(editor-swift): add status popover tools and robust semantic index diagnostics
  • feat(xcode): show granular build context resolution progress in toolbar
  • feat(xcode): track semantic index readiness across editor status
  • fix: add debug info to VersionsSection for troubleshooting platform filtering
  • fix: clean Localizable.xcstrings — remove 31 stale entries and fix missing translations
  • fix: compile error in sidebarVersions logging (removed .unique())
  • fix: derive sidebar platform title from version platform instead of app platform
  • fix: enhance version display with platform labels and add comprehensive debugging
  • fix: fallback to all versions when platform filter returns empty
  • fix: show all platform versions in sidebar without deduplication
  • fix(device-info): aggregate logical CPU usage by physical cores
  • fix(editor-outline-rail): add Chinese translations for Localizable.xcstrings
  • fix(editor-source): guard invalid fold ranges during async rebuild
  • fix(editor-swift): localize semantic index labels and scope loading indicator
  • fix(lsp): refresh SourceKit when build context becomes ready
  • fix(lsp): restart SourceKit when buildServerPath becomes available
